title: Search Engine Architecture Components and Data Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the main components of a typical search engine architecture and how data and queries flow between them.
relationships: Crawler fetches web pages and sends to Indexer
Indexer processes documents and builds the Index
User enters query through User Interface
Query Processor parses query and consults Index
Ranking Algorithm scores and orders results from Index
Ranked results are returned to User Interface
